name: CRUD Manajemen User - Tambah, Edit, Ubah Role, Hapus
description: Test CRUD user: tambah user baru, ubah role ke Manager, hapus. Login admin dulu.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login, fill email admin@inventory.com and password password, click login
Manajemen User page visible with users table
Fill nama with 'User CRUD Test', email with 'usercrud@test.com', password with 'Password123!', select role 'Staff Gudang' from dropdown, then click Simpan
'User CRUD Test' appears in users table with role Staff Gudang
Click Ubah button on User CRUD Test row
Change the role to 'Manager' and click Simpan
Type 'User CRUD Test' in the search input
User CRUD Test found in search results
Click Hapus on User CRUD Test row
User CRUD Test removed from table
